data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Enhancing security by requiring multiple forms of verification.
data.technical_spec: Integration of Azure AD MFA for account protection.

data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Real-time threat detection and automated responses.
data.technical_spec: Powered by Microsoft Defender for endpoint security.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Protects user data through encryption measures.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption standard for data at rest and in transit.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent vulnerability assessments and penetration testing.
data.technical_spec: Participation in bug bounty programs for identifying weaknesses.

data.title: Firewall and Network Security
data.description: Strong perimeter defenses against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of web application firewalls and DDoS protection.
